summary: US-010 is fully implemented. `src/domain/snapshotToScene.ts` contains `mapSnapshotToScene()` — a pure, deterministic function mapping NetworkSnapshot to 6 SceneParams (height, symmetry, fracture, fog, lightIntensity, ruinLevel), all clamped [0,1]. Fast state yields high symmetry (>0.9) and height; poor state yields high fracture (>0.7) and ruinLevel. The mapper uses a weighted degradation signal (55% RTT, 35% jitter, 15% loss) with no three.js imports. Comprehensive unit tests (tests/unit/domain/snapshotToScene.us010.test.ts) verify all 4 acceptance criteria: fast→high symmetry, poor→high fracture, determinism with exact value checks, and full mapping coverage including monotonicity, boundary, NaN/Infinity, and preset round-trip tests. Full quality gate passes: lint, typecheck, 243 unit tests, 36 e2e tests.
